div.p: The official URL for this implementation guide is:
xxxA brief description of what this IG is about

description.value: xxxA brief description of what this IG is about

valueMarkdown.value: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology

description.value: The sample was reordered.
Suspend treatment lab results.
This profile represents the current facility at which the patient is receiving treatment.

name.value: HIV Viral Load Result Revised By

description.value: The user index for the person who reviewed the viral load result.
This profile is to record the pregnacy status for the patient.
The province index for the performing organization.
Result Dispatched
The healthcare professional who has been assigned to a given lab task.
The result of the lab test which determines whether the patient is infected with HIV or not.
Organization requesting for HIV testing services.
ARV adherence.

name.value: HIV Viral Load Result Tested By

description.value: The user index for the person who tested the viral load specimen.
This profile represents the confirmation of HIV diagnosis.
Specimen conservation information.
Age of the patient calculated in years.

name.value: Specimen Type Used In Viral Load testing

description.value: A list of specimen types.
A code used to indicate the category for the lab result.
The result status index.
The district index for the performing organization.
Viral load result absolute decimal
Implementing partner organization.

name.value: Reasons why a lab order was cancelled or rejected

description.value: Reasons why a lab order was cancelled or rejected.
A patient resource for an HIV Patient
A report as a result of the lab task being completed.
HIV lab order task activity.
This profile is used to enrol the patient into HIV care.
This profile is to record whether an HIV patient is new.
Viral Load Log
Sample dispatched to lab task.
This profile is to record prescribed ARV regimen
Funding organization.
The user index for the person who is requesting or performing the service request.
Indication whether a patient should receive SMS messages.
Repeat lab results.
Organization responsible for carrying out the HIV testing services.
The device platform used for testing.
A service request that initiates the need for the lab to collect the test sample.
Used by the careplan to indicate the reason why a patient had their ARV regimen changed.
Assists with tracking the state of the lab order and its completion status.
This profile is to record the date when HIV test was done for a patient.
The index for the funding organization.
Breastfeeding patient.
Organization providing HIV Testing Services.
The ARV regimen has been switched to a new ARV regimen or has been substituted by another ARV regimen.
Describes a patient's current viral load status.
A list of possible HIV conditions.
Used by the observation to indicate whether a patient is pregnant.
Codes used to represent a medication request for ART.
The test result was entered manually.
Age of the patient calculated in months.
ARV Adherence
The test sample that was collected for the initiated lab order.
A list of ARV regimen.
The index for the implementing partner organization.
A list of HIV test types

name.value: Reason for Assessment or Test Not Performed

description.value: A list of reasons associated with the service request for the lab order.
Used by the observation to indicate that a HIV test was performed.
